Du De жќњеѕ·
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Du De (жќњеѕ·). Stayed behind to help the ulcer ridden Zhang Qun survive till Wu sent rescue party. Du De was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
